name: test-mcp-server
description: MCP server with React components using FastMCP and OpenAI Apps SDK

scripts.install:all: npm run install:components && npm run install:server
scripts.install:server: uv venv --python 3.12 && uv pip install -r server/requirements.txt
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run server:dev
scripts.start:prod: npm run build && npm run server:prod
